endpoints.name: View the facet information corresponding to a search
endpoints.description: In the NSIDC Search and Arctic Data Explorer interfaces, this endpoint is used in conjunction with /OpenSearch whenever a user submits a new search. Consequently, it has the same parameters as /OpenSearch.

endpoints.name: Search documents using the OpenSearch 1.1 Specification
endpoints.description: This endpoint uses parameters from the OpenSearch 1.1 specification, as well as parameters from the OpenSearch Geo (1.0) and SRU (1.0) extensions.

endpoints.name: Describes the web interface of NSIDC's data search engine
endpoints.description: Describes the web interface of NSIDC's data search engine

endpoints.name: Suggest search terms based on a partial query
endpoints.description: In NSIDC Search and the Arctic Data Explorer, this endpoint is queried whenever the user types into the search terms box, and the returned suggestions are displayed in a dropdown beneath the search terms box. The q parameter and returned JSON follow the specifications of the OpenSearch Suggestions 1.0 extension.
